title: Document source registry policy and workflow
action: Document how sources are classified, trusted, stored, and validated.
implementation: Create `docs/source-registry.md` with sections: Purpose, Source Types, Trust Levels, Storage Policy, Adding A Source, Validation.
State that official GESP sources are canonical for level and official knowledge scope.
State that OJ mirrors and solution articles are not official and must not override official classification.
State that full text storage remains disabled unless license policy changes.
Update `data/source-registry/README.md` to point to `docs/source-registry.md` and `npm run validate:sources`.

criteria: grep -q 'official GESP sources are canonical' docs/source-registry.md
grep -q 'must not override official classification' docs/source-registry.md

execution.summary: Documented source types, trust levels, storage policy, source update workflow, and validation command.
